title: Ma On Shan Public Library
summary: Ma On Shan Public Library (Chinese: 馬鞍山公共圖書館) is a public library located at 14 On Chun Street, Ma On Shan, Hong Kong. It opened on 2 April 2005 and was built next to Ma On Shan Park. It occupies an area of 2,200 square metres (24,000 sq ft). It has a characteristic main building in a cylindrical shape. The library has over 150,000 books.
text:
Ma On Shan Public Library (Chinese: 馬鞍山公共圖書館) is a public library located at 14 On Chun Street, Ma On Shan, Hong Kong. It opened on 2 April 2005 and was built next to Ma On Shan Park. It occupies an area of 2,200 square metres (24,000 sq ft). It has a characteristic main building in a cylindrical shape. The library has over 150,000 books.

Facility
Study Hall
Multimedia Room
Self-service locker
